hdec5ac78gb363g4b3egae40g1a3e9ad27caa: *You are swallowed by a chorus of frenzied music. Through one creature sings many voices: the harmony of a myconid collective.*
h632ce2e7g45c9g4681gace1ga9a3069de285: ((*sovereign. he has come. the rot has come*))
he3da383bgfcdeg413cgb660g2af8fd48283f: ((*sovereign. she has come. the rot has come*))
hffff17e6g6212g444egb9c0gd8fcd69d0848: *The fright-choir fades. A single melody rises above the others, brassy and commanding.*
h72c0e528gea1ag4fc5ga722gc46a0f22df61: ((*I am sovereign. And you are duergar. You are rot.*))
h38ce752dg3413g4b7eg977dg2c1e39aa0e7b: *You see a vision: your lifeless body, wrapped in fungal tendrils. The sovereign is threatening you.*
hec3013cfgb71bg4712g92c8gf0a9ed2d350d: Conjure tranquil memories in hopes of calming the sovereign.
h8a3b4bbagef72g40c7ga4eeg02c25870c4f7: Kneel in submission. I mean no harm to you.
hdbba6afcg2cb0g4af9g99c8g2c80e52bb201: Kneel in submission. My duergar companion means you no harm.
h2b98f58fg8967g46fbg93d2g9a48134d7372: If I wanted you dead, you would be. Don't tempt me.
h92ba066bg232fg4a7cg8974g76db946e2dce: ((*I am sovereign. And you bring the rot. Duergar.*))
h31fe873dg4c9fg4746gb360g90d97752ed6a: *You are swallowed by a chorus of turbulent music. Through one creature sings many voices: the harmony of a myconid collective.*
h50ddbe6egd80ag41cag86acg6574721bfac0: *You are swallowed by a chorus of turbulent music. Through one creature sings many voices: the harmony of an entire collective.*
h08903579g4326g4c85g878fg80a786fe93c0: ((*sovereign. he has come. he is here*))
h8f3ef3deg7c34g4190g8029g8bbe2990c6af: ((*sovereign. she has come. she is here*))
h85641b21ga417g4d51g816dg98aba849345c: *The choir fades. A single melody rises above the others, brassy and commanding.*
h00d4abc3g4792g49c1ga079gb3a6ed3b0d8d: *You see a vision: your lifeless body, wrapped in fungal tendrils. The sovereign is threatening you.*
hf69c350agff40g4babga185g83b4318c60d1: I sense your fear. I've come to aid you.
h20ecbcdfg0d61g485cgb321g015d63465ed9: Focus on your parasite and connect with the sovereign.
h8dd14b17ga5d0g4d84ga91ege50e4b78f319: *The parasite is quiet. You feel no bond with the creature.*
h4dc1b7ccg4240g4cccga34egfb78cebaf2ff: I am a traveller seeking adventure.
h813ef249gfa73g44acgbe8dgacb158929491: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, seeking your true intent.*
hcab02046gfc3bg48e0gab56g62e74aa5c5b6: *Then the sovereign drones a new melody, cautious but welcoming.*
h28835ed5ge947g413dg9765g7ebc1ac836d1: ((*I can neither mend skin nor spirit. But we still might commune.*))
h92ce01fegd18fg4441gb86agf122d9620cac: ((*Descend to me. Let us speak in flesh.*))
h80c04fe9g1a52g4006g9b10g41e71e620710: *The persistent music coaxes you forward. The sovereign expects you.*
h9664e43ag2321g4da1g8ae4g1621168b397e: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, poking you, warning you...*
h783aaa99gda83g4215g93cbgb0ea1528da9b: Seek understanding. Focus on the sovereign's song.
ha22d2105gfbc3g4845gb8d6g306e40b18072: *You detect a distinct quiver in every note. These creatures have experienced recent tragedy.*
hdfcb84d0g9087g437dga828ga72277b31d34: *You discern no information or intention in the sovereign's song.*
h0918bb69g37ebg48caga193g31e2b1546d27: Counter with your own memory. Duergar builders, not burners. Not rot.
h05fc15d0gff84g4fb5g908fg4f1c2566501e: The Underdark is my home - I don't need your permission to pass.
h314cd883g76c3g4b69gabc1ge29091fb65e2: Mumble an ancient gith axiom in rhythm with the sovereign.
h49e78f83g9173g4789g9b94g793cc8c68764: Hum a peaceful tune in harmony with the sovereign.
h800eb885g8d30g49d1g92a2g6c959f68e56a: You dare call me rot? I'll kill you.
h12aa9d82g3789g4548g8178gd70e05a41390: These tricks of the mind don't frighten me - I'll kill you!
h6dec0a06ge7cfg47a1g9da8g1767a5a0a2e7: Let me pass. I've come for the runaway gnome.
